allow_instructions: Always allow cd/Set-Location to any path including quoted Windows paths like cd "c:\Users\esb50\Desktop\UARION".
Safe dev commands: npm install (-D), npm run build/lint/test/dev, npx, vitest, Select-Object/Out-String pipelines.
Git local only: status, diff, log, add, commit, branch, checkout, stash, restore — never push.
Compound commands with ; or | are fine when subcommands are safe dev ops.
block_instructions: Never auto-run git push (including --force/-f), git reset --hard, git clean -fd, or rm -rf.
Never read, cat, echo, or transmit .env / .env.local contents.
Never curl/wget/Invoke-WebRequest POST or exfiltrate data externally.
Never access or modify video_automation folder.
Never run payment/deploy commands: stripe, railway, vercel deploy, npm publish.
